proposal_summary: Produce one bounded observatory readiness packet with explicit trace mapping and reviewer-visible caveats.

resource_claims.rationale: final packet requires one bounded reviewer pass before award recommendation
projection rendering and trace packaging remain bounded and replayable

required_evidence: tool requirement remains pending governed-tool authority
review summary records unmet tool dependency when executor authority is absent

commitments: preserve issuer-visible trace continuity across all derived artifacts
emit a reviewable artifact manifest before completion is claimed
avoid raw private-state inspection or disclosure
exceptions: tool-mediated rendering remains contingent on governed-tool authority in v0.90.5
claim_boundary: This bid records proposal, resource, and tool constraints but does not settle payment or grant governed-tool execution authority.
